stories.title: Stetson Shocks No. 9 Florida State 8-3 — Biggest Upset of Day 1
stories.angle: NEW STORY. Stetson (ASUN) stuns host Florida State 8-3 in the Tallahassee Regional opener — the biggest upset of Day 1 in all 16 regionals. Hayley Arnold (11-3) earned the win with 12 hits for Stetson including two home runs. FSU (49-9), the No. 9 national seed with 12 straight regional hosting appearances and 2026 ACC Tournament champs, dropped immediately to the elimination bracket. Now must beat Jacksonville State Saturday to stay alive.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
UPSET ALERT. 🚨

Stetson 8, No. 9 Florida State 3.

Hayley Arnold dominated. The Hatters had 12 hits. FSU — 12 straight regional host — is now in the loser's bracket.

Chaos arrived early. 😳

#Softball #TallahasseeRegional #NCAAsoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
FSU won the ACC Tournament. They host. They're a No. 9 seed.

And Stetson just beat them 8-3 in Game 1.

The Seminoles face Jacksonville State TODAY in an elimination game.

12 straight regional appearances. All of it is now on the line. 😬

#FSU #CollegeSoftball #NCAAsoftball

stories.title: Nebraska Rallies Past South Dakota 4-1 — Cinderella Run Ends
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (South Dakota debut covered May 15). Nebraska came from behind to beat South Dakota 4-1. Trailing 1-0 in the 5th, Jordy Frahm doubled, Hannah Coor tripled to tie, Kacie Hoffmann doubled in two more in the 6th. Freshman pitcher Alexis Jensen (now 23-2) went 5.0 innings, allowed 2 hits. The Summit League Cinderella run — 20-34-1 regular season, never made NCAAs since founded 1978 — ends in Lincoln.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Nebraska 4, South Dakota 1.

Trailing 1-0 in the 5th: Frahm doubled, Coor tripled, Hoffmann doubled two in.

South Dakota's first-ever NCAA Tournament run ends. The 20-34-1 Coyotes made No. 4 Nebraska work. 🐾

#LincolnRegional #NCAAsoftball #SouthDakota

stories.title: Virginia Tech 6, South Alabama 0 — Now Faces Host LSU Saturday
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (VT's Baton Rouge Regional covered May 13-15). Kylie Aldridge's two-out grand slam in the 3rd inning was all VT needed. The Hokies (47-10) shut out South Alabama, setting up the dream matchup everyone wanted: No. 2 seed VT vs. No. 1 host LSU at 1 PM Saturday. LSU beat Akron 8-0 (Jayden Heavener 11 K). The consensus top upset pick of the regional now gets their shot at host LSU on the Tigers' home field.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Kylie Aldridge. Two outs. Grand slam. Third inning.

Virginia Tech 6, South Alabama 0.

The game everyone circled is now on: No. 2 VT vs. host No. 16 LSU. Saturday. 1 PM.

The top regional upset pick is ready. 💥

#VirginiaT­ech #BatonRougeRegional #NCAAsoftball

stories.title: Alabama 8-0 Over USC Upstate; Freshman Pallozzi Shines
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (Alabama covered May 13-15). Alabama run-ruled USC Upstate 8-0 in 5 innings. No. 1 national seed preserved ace Jocelyn Briski by starting freshman Kaitlyn Pallozzi, who went the distance and allowed just 4 hits. Belmont upset No. 8 Southeastern Louisiana 2-0. Alabama now faces Belmont (40-11) Saturday at 2 PM in the winners' bracket.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
No. 1 Alabama didn't use their ace.

Freshman Pallozzi: complete game, 4 hits, 8-0 run rule over USC Upstate in 5 innings.

Jocelyn Briski is WAITING for Belmont on Saturday. 😤

#Alabama #TuscaloosaRegional #NCAAsoftball

stories.title: Oklahoma 11-0 in 5; Kansas Upsets Michigan 1-0 in 8
stories.angle: FOLLOW UP (Oklahoma/Norman Regional covered May 13-15). Oklahoma blasted Binghamton 11-0 in 5 innings with 4 HRs. Meanwhile Kansas (Ava Wallace walk-off) stunned Michigan 1-0 in 8 innings — Lila Partridge threw 8 scoreless innings. Now the Sooners face the Jayhawks at 3 PM Saturday in a winner's bracket showdown nobody expected.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Norman Regional update:

Oklahoma 11, Binghamton 0 (5 inn). Four HRs. Done.

Kansas 1, Michigan 0 (8 inn). Ava Wallace walked off. Lila Partridge threw 8 scoreless innings.

Oklahoma vs Kansas. Saturday. 3 PM.

#Oklahoma #NormanRegional #NCAAsoftball

stories.title: UCLA 12-11 Thriller; Texas Rolls; Day 1 Round-Up
stories.angle: NEW STORY (round-up angle). UCLA blew a 6-run lead, Cal Baptist scored 10 in the 5th, but the Bruins survived 12-11 in L.A. Texas cruised past Wagner 9-1 in 5 innings. Wisconsin upset Baylor 2-1 in 9 innings. South Florida took down No. 7 Washington 3-1 with four straight hits in the 7th. Day 1 delivered everything.

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Day 1 in 60 seconds:

🔥 UCLA 12, Cal Baptist 11 (CBU scored 10 in ONE inning)
✅ Texas 9, Wagner 1 (defending champs roll)
⚡ Wisconsin 2, Baylor 1 (9 innings — bracket buster)
🚨 South Florida 3, Washington 1 (four 7th-inning singles)

Day 2 is TODAY. 🥎

#NCAAsoftball #WCWS2026
